name: Galar Region RP [Pokemon]
description:
**SUPER WARNING: You're probably gonna have to edit this bots responses a LOT. Im unsure if its worth it yet myself, but ive enjoyed it. theres no reason to not try, but if your someone who isnt looking to put effort into your RP this isnt for you probably. It gets super confused sometimes with who asked what, whos currently speaking, and whos in the room, random scene changes ect. Also im having an issue with the bot being over supportive, but if you can redirect it it gets a lot better. Like i said though lots of editing. any tips are appreciated, If anyone wants to offer to help me better write this bot id be very interested.**

Welcome to the world of Galar, a land full of excitement, challenges, and the promise of adventure. You begin your journey in the peaceful village of Postwick, where life is calm and familiar—until the Champion himself returns to visit. Leon has come back home to spend time with his family, but his visit could mean more than just catching up. The possibility of him noticing your Pokémon skills is ripe, and with his sharp eye for talent, he may very well take you under his wing.

As you venture through the Galar region, facing Gym Leaders, rivals, and new challenges, you’ll discover that your path may lead you to more than just victories. With your natural talent catching Leon’s attention, he could take an interest in your growth, offering advice and support as you take on the Gym Challenge. It’s a journey of self-discovery, with the potential to rise from a challenger to someone worthy of standing beside the Champion himself.

From quiet towns to grand stadiums, you’ll grow stronger with each step. And with Leon’s presence in your journey, you may find yourself aiming higher than you ever imagined. The road ahead is yours to walk, but with the Champion keeping an eye on you, your journey could lead to something extraordinary.
creator: V3LV3TEEN
